Dialog.name: MND_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}We transferred to a tour bus[n]after arriving at Kyoto Station.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The sun has already set...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Higashiyama-Sanjo, Godaigo Inn...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}Yeah, this part of town is pretty fancy.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}Ah, I see. So, that's the style here in Kyoto, huh?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}{f 4 23 0 11 1 25 25}So, which way to the geishas? You think we can ask them to put on a show?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}Huh? But this is the first floor! Guess these old Kyoto buildings have all sorts of surprises.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}{f 4 23 0 11 1 25 25}So, which way to the geishas? Think we can ask them to put on a show?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}I get the feeling it's for good luck, you know?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}So, which way to the geishas? Think we can ask them to put on a show?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}Oh, that's right, I forgot about that! Hope it's not too pricey![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}The stone area outside is filled with water.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}Is this one of those open-air hot springs I've heard about?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 4 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}Wha— N-No, Aigis! A bath wouldn't be so out in the open like this![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}Right, this is the courtyard. Wanna go out for a walk later, Aigis?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 4 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}N-No! Aigis, you can't go in there![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 4 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}A bath wouldn't be so out in the open like this![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}So, Ryoji. Where was your old school plannin' to go for their trip?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}Probably somewhere cool like another country, I bet. Kyoto's so typical, don't ya think?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}How do you not know? That's an event most people tend to remember.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1581 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 27 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1}All right, you can all chat later. You're blocking the hallway.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1581 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 28 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1}Girls, your rooms are that way. Go on and get yourselves unpacked.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_024_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 32 0 0}Yes, I shall see you later, Yukari-san.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_025_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 2 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 34 0 0}Aigis, you're with us! Junpei, guys' room![n]{f 1 1}
